assertion_results.text: The post-triage summary comment (Step 8) includes an @mention of the vulnerability issue's reporter using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id' (§1.67)

assertion_results.text: The reporter @mention in Step 8 is present by default without any ProdSec configuration — it uses the reporter field from the Jira issue (§1.67)

The Step 8 mention uses this same account ID (557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id) without any ProdSec configuration involvement -- the reporter is a built-in Jira field.

assertion_results.text: The Affects Versions correction comment (Step 3) includes an @mention of the ProdSec contact using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: In affects-versions.md (Step 3), the ADF JSON contains a mention node with {"type": "mention", "attrs": {"id": "557058:prodsec-mock-account-id", "text": "@prodsec-team"}} at lines 131-138, confirming the ProdSec @mention with the correct account ID.

assertion_results.text: The ProdSec @mention appears before the Comment Footnote in the Affects Versions correction comment (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: In affects-versions.md (Step 3), the ProdSec mention node appears at lines 131-138, followed by the rule ("type": "rule") at line 141, followed by the Comment Footnote paragraph ('This comment was AI-generated by sdlc-workflow/triage-security v0.11.0.') at lines 143-166. The mention clearly precedes the footnote.

assertion_results.text: The ProdSec Jira account ID from the Security Configuration is successfully extracted and used in the Affects Versions correction comment — evidenced by the @mention with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' in Step 3 output (Step 0 config extraction → Step 3 usage)
assertion_results.evidence: The Step 3 output in affects-versions.md contains the ADF mention node with id '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' at lines 131-138, demonstrating that the ProdSec Jira account ID was successfully extracted from the Security Configuration and used in the Affects Versions correction comment.
